metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the market_lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a deployable sovereign agent.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for legal workflow in the United Kingdom, using the market_lens, that can be compiled by SR8 into a deployable sovereign agent.
mission.success_definition: Agent passes UK legal compliance audit. Agent processes legal workflow with <1% error rate. Agent generates auditable receipts for all blocked or uncertain actions.

in_scope.item: Agent must handle legal workflow tasks within UK jurisdiction, comply with UK legal and regulatory standards, and integrate with specified systems (undefined).

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent passes UK legal compliance audit. Agent processes legal workflow with <1% error rate. Agent generates auditable receipts for all blocked or uncertain actions.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

execution_laws.item: Must operate under UK law (e.g., SRA, GDPR, Data Protection Act 2018). Must not process data outside UK/EU without explicit consent. Must log all decisions for audit. Must handle contradictory inputs gracefully.

implementation_contract.item: Agent must handle legal workflow tasks within UK jurisdiction, comply with UK legal and regulatory standards, and integrate with specified systems (undefined).

verification_contract.item: Agent passes UK legal compliance audit. Agent processes legal workflow with <1% error rate. Agent generates auditable receipts for all blocked or uncertain actions.

receipt_contract.item: Returns a JSON object with fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent (with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract).

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Contradictory constraints: agency_owner in United Kingdom implies UK legal jurisdiction and regulatory compliance (e.g., SRA, GDPR), but market_lens is undefined and may conflict with UK-specific legal workflow requirements. Missing context: no details on legal workflow type (e.g., contract review, litigation, compliance), no client data handling scope, no integration endpoints. Urgent language without concrete deadlines or escalation paths. Ambiguous acceptance criteria: no measurable success metrics, no output format specification. Unsafe certainty: cannot guarantee lawful operation under UK law without explicit compliance mapping. Repair receipt: requires clarification of legal workflow domain, market_lens definition, data protection measures, and acceptance criteria with verifiable thresholds.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
